title: Waystones x Dye Depot compat
description: Adds missing models, translations, textures, resources in general, for compatibility between Dye Depot and the Waystones mod
body:
# Waystones x Dye Depot

Adds missing resources for the Waystones mod's _Colored Sharestones_ to support the Dye Depot mod's extra colorations.

Warning! This is a **compatibility** resource pack between the [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) and [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot) mods. While it won't break your game if you don't have those two mods loaded, it will only throw in pointless junk into your logs if you have it alone.
